heading: Threat assessments
label: 1140 Threat assessments
text: Not later than 1 year after , the Secretary shall complete a name-based security background check against the consolidated terrorist watchlist and an immigration status check for all public transportation frontline employees, similar to the threat assessment screening program required for facility employees and longshoremen by the Commandant of the Coast Guard under Coast Guard Notice USCG–2006–24189 (71 Fed. Reg. 25066 ()).August 3, 2007April 8, 2006
